creator: hlh@restart.be
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #24)
Such a patch seems cumbersome. I think it would be better to switch the repository to  https://github.com/gregstoll/gallery2 (it seems it is supporting php 8) or https://github.com/hlh-restart/gallery2-1 witch I upgrade when I encounter problems with my own use.
